positive: A minimalist, symmetrical portrait of a stylized celestial woodland creature—a fox-like spirit made of glowing amethyst crystal and bioluminescent moss. The creature is seated peacefully amidst giant, geometrically shaped flora and delicate, floating constellations. Focus on strong, contrasting silhouettes and intricate, clean line work. Use a deep indigo and vibrant cyan color palette, accented by sharp, luminous purples and emerald greens. The composition must be centered, suitable for a high-contrast t-shirt print, with perfect symmetry and clean edges. Studio shot, vector art aesthetic, ethereal glowing effect, ultra-detailed, photorealistic rendering, maximalist level of detail, 4k print quality.
